function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-26
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Northstar follow-up pack invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0005                      |
| alias          | northstar_followup_pack       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-26                    |
| total_eur      | 420                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 420      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

function.message: Completed. I worked the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md`: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter from visible invoice data, preserved the original note body beneath it, kept the diff focused, and then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS for inbox and finance lanes, used finance schema/workflows for migration, preserved original body verbatim under frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice file. The target file contained all required invoice-schema fields and line-item values; frontmatter was added accordingly per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and migration workflows, then the processed inbox file was deleted per `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD` and `process-next-inbox-item.md`.
